---
title: "Jin Niu"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jin-niu-4111a5205/
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
---

Hi! I am a Ph.D. student studying economics at [Brown University](https://economics.brown.edu/). I finished my undergraduate studies at the [Univeristy of Michigan, Ann Arbor](https://umich.edu/), where I majored in economics, statistics, and minored in math. 

My research interests include applied econometrics, urban economics, and public economics.

Contact me: jin_niu [at] brown [dot] edu
